entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A major legume crop (Cajanus cajan) grown in the semi arid tropics, particularly in India.

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea genotypes to withstand high salt concentrations.

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: An ever-increasing abiotic stress to cultivated land that affects plant growth, development, and yield.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A primary region where pigeonpea is grown.

entities.name: SEMI ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The climatic region where pigeonpea is a major legume crop.

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The physical growth of the plant, which is negatively affected by salinity.

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological development of the plant, which is negatively affected by salinity.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the crop, which is negatively affected by salinity.

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL VARIATION
entities.description: Physical structural differences assessed in pigeonpea genotypes for salinity tolerance.

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL VARIATION
entities.description: Internal biological function differences assessed in pigeonpea genotypes for salinity tolerance.
